mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 5.5% over 3 months signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off behavior and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and consumer prices indicates strong demand pressures, leading to inflationary expectations that drive equity market optimism and positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 for any 3-year window or 60-day returns in co-moving regimes are negative.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production above its 12-month moving average signals robust supply-side dynamics, generating positive earnings momentum and S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX underperforms baseline by > 2% in 5-day horizons during INDPRO growth phases.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts above 2,200 thousand units signals strong demand for residential construction, boosting related sectors and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline by > 1.5% in 20-day horizons during housing boom triggers.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening cycle characterized by rising federal funds rates and declining money supply growth reduces liquidity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 for any 3-year window or 60-day returns in tightening regimes are positive.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in payroll employment below 130,000 new jobs signals weak labor market performance, prompting defensive equity positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized decline in GDP and consumer confidence indicates weakening demand, leading to risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 for any 3-year window or 20-day returns in contraction regimes are positive.
